data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizing the number of choices to optimize user decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: UI design focuses on minimalism and clarity in navigation.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Designing interactive elements to be accessible and large enough to be easily clicked.
data.technical_spec: CTA buttons are prominently placed and easily reachable.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer websites to work similarly to others they use, ensuring intuitive design.
data.technical_spec: Adopts common design patterns and conventions from leading tech platforms.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limiting content chunks to manageable amounts for better cognitive processing.
data.technical_spec: Content is broken into short, digestible sections with clear headings.

data.title: Norman’s Law
data.description: Accentuates the simplicity of design by focusing on human-centered design.
data.technical_spec: Adapts a user-centric approach throughout the development lifecycle.
